0176775d7a8e.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
0176775d7a8e.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
0176775d7a8e.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

e9497fcfd894.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
e9497fcfd894.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
e9497fcfd894.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

0bb279ceaf08.title: Close the hygiene gap — 1 to 5
0bb279ceaf08.description: An FSA rating of 1 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
0bb279ceaf08.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

5573bc44a7e5.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
5573bc44a7e5.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

3cd09fe175b7.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
3cd09fe175b7.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
3cd09fe175b7.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

1921c02de576.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
1921c02de576.description: Your 4.7/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
1921c02de576.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

19db1a164108.title: Ranked #6 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
19db1a164108.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

77a44b683623.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
77a44b683623.description: You trail peers by 1.7 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

ec413f340af1.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
ec413f340af1.description: You trail peers by 3.3 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

511b23d8b281.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
511b23d8b281.description: You trail peers by 2.0 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

43572a0a4422.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
43572a0a4422.description: At 108 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
